overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a vehicle navigating through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The journey begins at a gas station, proceeds through urban streets and underpasses, and continues through tunnels with atmospheric fire effects, showcasing the game's ray-traced lighting and wet surface reflections.

events.description: vehicle exits covered gas station canopy into open rainy street
vehicle turns right onto main road

agents.ego_description: pulling out from gas station and turning onto wet city street

notable_agents.action: standing near gas station pillar observing the vehicle

entered.detail: large metal roof structure covering fuel pumps
futuristic fuel dispenser with glowing interface
large illuminated billboard with red and white graphics
silver sedan parked near the station

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a covered gas station canopy at night during heavy rain. A pedestrian stands near a pillar on the left as the vehicle pulls out, turns right onto the wet street, and leaves the sheltered area for the open road.

agents.ego_description: cruising through wet city streets approaching tunnel entrance

entered.detail: large concrete barriers lining the road entrance
orange and white striped construction barriers
glowing pink and blue commercial signage

segments.scene_description: Driving through rain-slicked urban streets with neon signs visible in the distance. The vehicle approaches and enters a concrete underpass, transitioning from the open air to an enclosed tunnel environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass tunnel with chain link fencing

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the enclosed tunnel passage

entered.detail: metal fencing along the tunnel wall
support columns for the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through a dimly lit concrete tunnel with chain link fencing along the walls. Overhead lights illuminate the wet asphalt as the tunnel walls pass by closely on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial street with warehouses and fencing

events.description: vehicle exits tunnel into open industrial area

agents.ego_description: navigating through open streets past industrial buildings

entered.detail: large concrete industrial building with graffiti
tall lamp posts illuminating the wet road

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into an open industrial district, the vehicle passes warehouses and chain link fences. Street lights reflect off the wet pavement as the car continues through the rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel with burning debris and emergency lighting

events.description: vehicle enters second tunnel with visible fire damage
passing burning debris and fire on left roadside

agents.ego_description: driving through tunnel while passing fire and burning wreckage

entered.detail: intense fire and smoke from wreckage on roadside
smooth concrete walls of the second tunnel
abandoned vehicles along the tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a second tunnel where burning debris illuminates the left side with an orange glow. Abandoned cars line the right wall as the car continues through the smoky, fire-damaged underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked city that transitions from a neon-lit urban center into a desolate, fire-damaged industrial zone. It begins under the shelter of a gas station canopy during heavy rain, pulling away from a pedestrian to merge onto the slick, open streets. As the vehicle navigates the neon-lit city, the scene shifts from the open air into a dimly lit concrete tunnel lined with chain link fencing and overhead lights. The camera then emerges from the tunnel into an industrial district of warehouses and wet pavement before turning into a second underpass. This final transition leads the vehicle through a smoky environment where burning debris casts an orange glow over abandoned cars and charred walls.
